title: mysqldump Best Practices for Large Databases
description: Create dumps that are easier to import: options, size tips, and safer workflows.
author: SQLSplit

content.text: The way you export a dump affects how easy it is to import. Small changes help a lot.

items: Test import on a staging DB

content.text: Related: **How to Split a mysqldump File Into Smaller Parts**.

content.title: Make imports painless
content.text: Split big dumps before moving them.

faq.question: Should I compress mysqldump output?
faq.answer: Yes. .sql.gz is smaller and easier to transfer.
